title: 4 Pack Floating Bee Island and Bee Drinking Station, 7.1 Inch Yellow Floating Water Feeder for Outdoor Pollinators, Bees and Butterflies
features: Natural Safety Design: The honeycomb surface of this Floating Bee Island mimics natural footholds with anti-slip texture, ensuring bees land securely without drowning risks. Its bright yellow colour enhances visibility from aerial distances for easy pollinator access.

Premium Eco-Friendly Material: Crafted from lightweight, buoyant resin for superior waterproofing and durability. This Watering Station is shatter-resistant and withstands all outdoor elements, maintaining integrity season after season.

Smart Dual-Purpose Function: Combines hydration with garden decoration in one sleek unit. The Bee Drinking Station features smooth edges for quick cleaning and stackable design to save storage space, promoting water conservation.

Versatile Application: Ideal for enhancing biodiversity in gardens, patios, or balcony settings. Use these Butterfly Water Stations in ponds or flower beds to attract thirsty pollinators while adding whimsical charm.

4-Pack Value Set: Perfect for Outdoors Thirsty Pollinators Feeding, this set includes 4 durable yellow stations. Each measures (7 diameter/0.1" thickness), providing stable hydration points for your ecosystem.
description: Product Description Usage For attracting and feeding bees, butterflies, and other pollinators outdoors This floating bee and butterfly watering station provides a safe drinking spot for thirsty pollinators in your garden. Its honeycomb design prevents drowning while attracting bees and butterflies from afar. Simply place it in water sources to support local ecosystems and reduce water waste. Ideal for outdoor spaces like patios, ponds, or balcony gardens, this station enhances biodiversity with its bright yellow colour. It serves as both a functional feeder and decorative accent. Use these stations to create hydration points in various environments, from urban farms to backyard flower beds. They are easy to clean and stack, making them a practical solution for year-round pollinator support in the UK climate. Specifications Quantity: 4 pieces Material: Lightweight and waterproof resin Colour: Yellow Dimensions: 17.8cm x 15.6cm x 0.25cm per unit Warm Tips Manual measurement, please allow slight errors on size. The colors may exist slight difference due to different screens.
